title: Find Unique Binary String
titleCn: 找出不同的二进制字符串

testcases.input: nums = ["01","10"] Output: "11" Explanation: "11" does not appear in nums. "00" would also be correct.
testcases.expectedOutput: "11" Explanation: "11" does not appear in nums. "00" would also be correct.

testcases.input: nums = ["00","01"] Output: "11" Explanation: "11" does not appear in nums. "10" would also be correct.
testcases.expectedOutput: "11" Explanation: "11" does not appear in nums. "10" would also be correct.

testcases.input: nums = ["111","011","001"] Output: "101" Explanation: "101" does not appear in nums. "000", "010", "100", and "110" would also be correct.
testcases.expectedOutput: "101" Explanation: "101" does not appear in nums. "000", "010", "100", and "110" would also be correct.
